goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'food type'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 12:15' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'friday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'arrival time', and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the cheap price range
Make sure you get phone number and food type
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 12:15 and should go to london liverpool street
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on friday
Make sure you get travel time, arrival time, and price
